query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(valorTotal AS DECIMAL(12,2)) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as valor_zero,
  SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(valorUnitario AS DECIMAL(12,4)) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as preco_zero,
  SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(valorTotal AS DECIMAL(12,2)) = 0 AND CAST(valorUnitario AS DECIMAL(12,4)) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ambos_zero
FROM vendas
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 41wMkRgfnqozYTj.root --database GsoitYr3hHiyZTgQLwp9sV --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(valorTotal AS DECIMAL(12,2)) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as valor_zero,
  SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(valorUnitario AS DECIMAL(12,4)) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as preco_zero,
  SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(valorTotal AS DECIMAL(12,2)) = 0 AND CAST(valorUnitario AS DECIMAL(12,4)) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ambos_zero
FROM vendas
